name: Confluence Crawler
description: Crawl an authenticated Confluence space (Atlassian Cloud or Server/Data Center) by page hierarchy and convert each page to clean Markdown with frontmatter. Handles macros, attachments, internal link rewriting, depth limiting, and idempotent re-crawling.
author: dropkit

input.arguments: space key and optional flags (e.g., ENG --depth 3 --output ./out)

env.CONFLUENCE_BASE_URL: Base URL. Cloud: https://<site>.atlassian.net/wiki. Server: https://confluence.corp.example.com
env.CONFLUENCE_API_TOKEN: API token (Cloud) or Personal Access Token (Server) — populated by setup_credentials.sh, never passed on CLI
env.CONFLUENCE_FLAVOR: Optional override: cloud | server (auto-detected from URL by default)

output.layout: flat directory of <slug>.md files plus an attachments/ folder
